'''''Black Hawk''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] that, along with its sister ship [[Furious (Lancer-class)|''Furious'']] escorted a convoy through the [[Eidoloni system/Legends|Eidoloni system]] which, belonging to [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]], transported a wide range of heavy materials used for the construction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
